deduplication.cross_package_key: normalized query plus unified identity equivalence
deduplication.within_package_action: one public sample with every hidden occurrence retained

metrics.absolute_precision_at_20: null for a change-only package because unchanged Top-20 items are intentionally not annotated
metrics.admitted_false_admission_rate: not_relevant admitted items divided by sufficiently informed admitted items
metrics.agreement: unweighted Cohen's kappa over the four pre-adjudication labels
metrics.changed_component_precision_at_20: positive changed items divided by query_count times 20, reported separately for baseline removals and experiment admissions
metrics.no_labels_behavior: all Precision, rate, paired-difference, stratified and kappa values are null
metrics.paired_precision_at_20_difference: mean per-query (positive admissions minus positive removals) divided by 20; available only when every change relation has a resolved non-insufficient label
metrics.removed_relevance_rate: positive removed items divided by sufficiently informed removed items

randomization.display_order: ascending SHA-256 of seed, display namespace, normalized query fingerprint and unified identity profile
randomization.public_sample_id: sequential SPAR-LX-160 identifiers assigned after randomized ordering
randomization.sampling: none; every unique Top-20 boundary change is covered
